We have been here a handful of times but have never ever had such terrible service and ok food. We were there on Saturday night with another couple at 5pm and asked to sit in the gardens section. Place was empty, but half hour later another couple came at another table. The waitress was just awful. Took forever to put our order in and then when it came husband’s burger was awful. The rest of us had salads which were ok. She never checked on us and no one came by with water and it took forever for plates to clear. We Didn’t stick around for dessert or coffee. We had to go to the hostess desk  to get the bill!

Having walked past many times on the way to and from our hotel, we finally decided to try it out. We wanted to eat outside, but there were no spaces free. We asked if we could go inside for a drink until one became available and were told not a problem at all, and shown to the bar. We didn’t have long to wait and were v quickly brought back outside and given a fabulous table right on the front row! The food was absolutely divine, and our waiter Abel was super friendly and efficient. We will definitely return next time we are in NYC - hopefully next time we get to try the terrace upstairs (which was closed for a private event).

We were lucky enough to get a table outside (which I recommend in the warmer months).  Fun atmosphere, there is always something going on in the park and it creates a fun vibe.  The staff is excellent.  The food is delicious and they are QUICK!  I would come back.
